name_cn:
New Dior ❤️❤️
This Lady Dior handbag is exquisitely designed with a spacious interior. Crafted from white lambskin, it features a woven grid quilting and a "D.I.O.R." charm, showcasing a fashionable and classic charm. The multi-compartment design is practical for various daily items. The chain is embellished with beads, making it easy to carry on the shoulder or crossbody.
Front "D.I.O.R." charm
Flip-top closure
1 exterior compartment
1 interior compartment
1 zip pocket
1 slip pocket
6 card slots
Chain embellished with beads
Made in Italy
Style: 3105
19.5 x 12.5 x 5 cm
